name.message: EasyTranslate - Web Page Translation | Online Translation | Text Selection Translation | Free Forever

description.message: This browser extension supports easy web page translation, text translation, and text selection translation. It supports multiple languages and allows one-click translation of any website content. Compatible with Chrome, Edge, and Firefox, making it easy to read foreign language web pages!

password_tip.message: Right-click on a password input field and select "Generate Random Password" to fill it directly

base64_tip.message: Base64 is an encoding scheme for converting binary data into ASCII strings, commonly used for data transmission and storage

json_output_placeholder.message: Formatted or compressed result will be displayed here...
